comment.body:
fix(audit): prefix every edited comment line in diff block
    
    Update comment body diff rendering to apply +/- prefixes to each line for multiline edits.
    
    - replace single printf lines with line-wise sed prefixing
    - preserve fenced diff block format for GitHub red/green rendering
    
    This ensures multiline comment edits are fully represented in per-event markdown diffs.

body.from:
refactor(audit): simplify LAST_100 columns and use comment-specific links
    
    Streamline LAST_100 readability and link precision.
    
    - remove Details column from LAST_100 table
    - render Issue column as linked issue number only
    - render Milestone column as linked milestone number only
    - prefer comment.html_url for target links (issuecomment anchors)
      with fallback to issue/milestone URLs
    
    Detailed before/after content remains available via per-event artifact links in the Event ID column.
